headline: SPACs Attack Weekly Recap: 6 Deals, Rumors And Headline News
summary:
It was another busy week for the SPAC market with numerous deal announcements and rumored deals.

Benzinga's "SPACs Attack" covered the deals and news of the week.

Here is our weekly look back.

headline: Exclusive: Gary Vee And Matt Higgins Talk Coinbase IPO, Going Public At Height Of A Trend
summary: As the markets wait with anticipation for this coming week's IPO of Coinbase, Matt Higgins and Gary Vaynerchuk joined Benzinga’s “SPACs Attack” last week to share their thoughts.

headline: Microsoft Reportedly In Talks To Buy Speech Tech Company Nuance
summary: A deal for Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) to buy the company that helped develop the Siri speech technology could be announced this coming week.

headline: Why Dogecoin Is Up 20%
summary: Meme cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is seeing major upwards movement in line with a rise in Bitcoin and as Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) Elon Musk has again chimed in.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Affirm, Bitcoin, BorgWarner, Credit Suisse And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story discusses why investors can no longer ignore cryptocurrencies.
	Other featured articles present companies pursuing Bitcoin opportunities and tips for investing in Bitcoin wisely.

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For April 12
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trades," Barbara Ann Bernard said she likes Dufry (OTC: DUFRY) and thinks it could double in three years.

headline: Analysts Upgraded AMC, Snap, United Airlines And Tesla In The Past Week
summary:
Amid last's week trading, analysts came out with new ratings for some widely-followed stocks.

Analysts and brokerage firms often use ratings when they issue stock recommendations to stock traders. Analysts arrive at stock ratings by researching public financial statements, communicating with executives and customers, and following industry trends.
